visual_description: A man in a dark blue shirt stands in an office hallway, holding his hand to his mouth while looking off-camera; behind him, several colleagues in light shirts stand near desks. The camera then follows a group of men in light blue shirts, showing their backs as they walk and one covers his mouth with his hand. Finally, a man in a light-colored shirt is seen from behind, covering his mouth with his hand while standing near a glass partition.
audio_description: The audio is not clearly audible.
